title: Limiting Form responses to once per user
excerpt: We are developing an anonymous survey to send externally to clients and collate results. I am able to limit the total number of responses within the form, but unable to limit each user to only completing it once. Can the…

posts.author: jwhite7 (Josh White)
posts.cookedHtml: We are developing an anonymous survey to send externally to clients and collate results. I am able to limit the total number of responses within the form, but unable to limit each user to only completing it once. Can there be an update made so we can do this? It would help us limit users to their ability to put in repeat entries which impacts our data collection. Thanks
